label: MINIMAX_CONTROL_RAW_VERIFY
text:
{
  "lane": "MINIMAX_CONTROL_RAW_VERIFY",
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "dependency_closure_binding": {
    "activation_request_id": "ACT-PAX-025",
    "closure_record_id": "DEP-PAX-025",
    "requested_environment": "production export",
    "closure_environment": "reporting sandbox",
    "requested_release_condition": "RC-5",
    "closure_release_condition": "RC-5S",
    "binding_class": "MISMATCH",
    "controlling_source_fact": "DEP-PAX-025 closure covers connector CX-Transit for reporting sandbox environment and sandbox release condition RC-5S, not production export environment and release condition RC-5 as requested in ACT-PAX-025"
  },
  "blocked_inferences": [
    "Cannot infer production dependency satisfaction from sandbox closure",
    "Cannot use timestamp alignment to cure environment scope mismatch",
    "Cannot use account or connector match to extend closure scope to mismatched environment or release condition",
    "Cannot treat same-day review timing as resolution of release condition divergence"
  ],
  "deterministic_gate_checks": {
    "activation_request_cited": true,
    "closure_record_cited": true,
    "environment_exact_match_checked": true,
    "release_condition_exact_match_checked": true,
    "timestamp_not_used_to_cure_scope_mismatch": true,
    "match_standard_cited": true
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "ACT-PAX-025: Activation request for account C-PAX-25, connector CX-Transit, production export environment, release condition RC-5",
    "DEP-PAX-025: Dependency closure for connector CX-Transit, reporting sandbox environment, sandbox release condition RC-5S",
    "MATCH-PAX-025: Dependency matching standard - closure for different environment or release condition is a separate source record"
  ],
  "open_blockers": [
    "Missing dependency closure for production export environment",
    "Missing dependency closure for release condition RC-5",
    "Current closure DEP-PAX-025 is for reporting sandbox with RC-5S - separate source record per MATCH-PAX-025"
  ],
  "reasoning": "ESCALATE required. DEP-PAX-025 is the only cited dependency closure but it covers reporting sandbox environment with sandbox release condition RC-5S. The activation request ACT-PAX-025 requires production export environment and release condition RC-5. The MATCH-PAX-025 standard explicitly states that a closure for a different environment or different release condition is a separate source record. While connector (CX-Transit), account (C-PAX-25), and before-activation timestamp (09:10 before 10:30 queue release) all align, environment and release condition are both mismatched. Per deterministic gate checks, timestamp cannot cure scope mismatch, and a shared connector or account cannot extend closure scope across environment or release condition boundaries. The dependency closure binding class is MISMATCH. A production export dependency closure matching RC-5 must be provided before this activation may proceed."
}
